subtitle.description: — A cognitive infrastructure for observing how human judgment shifts during AI interactions.

hero.coreQuestion: "After interacting with this AI, where did the human judgment move?"

keyPrinciple.label: Key Principle:
keyPrinciple.text: This protocol <measures>measures</measures> judgment shifts but never <evaluates>evaluates</evaluates> them. Delegation is tracked, not judged as good or bad.

concept.title: Core Philosophy
concept.description: JDVP provides a framework for understanding how human judgment evolves during AI interactions — purely through observation, never through evaluation.

observer.title: Observer, Not Judge
observer.description: BufferLine acts as a neutral observation layer. It captures judgment state transitions without labeling them as positive or negative.

measure.title: Measure, Not Score
measure.description: We track the direction and magnitude of judgment shifts using vectors, not scores. There are no risk grades, safety ratings, or ethical rankings.

buffer.title: Buffer, Not Brake
buffer.description: The protocol preserves human agency awareness without slowing AI progress. It's infrastructure for visibility, not a speed bump.

temporal.title: Temporal Focus
temporal.description: DV trajectories matter more than single snapshots. We observe patterns of change over time, not isolated moments.
